footer.note: Made with respect for the art.

hero.title: Come train on the mat.
hero.subtitle: Just Jiu-Jitsu, taught well. Gi and No-Gi, for kids and adults of all levels. Your first class is a trial, no commitment.

offer.title: What we train
offer.giDesc: The traditional kimono: grips, control and a solid technical base.
offer.nogiDesc: No kimono: faster and more dynamic, with lots of transitions.

schedule.title: When we train
schedule.note: Times are a guide. Confirm them when you sign up.

about.title: The Professor
about.body: Galindo has spent years on the mat — first competing, and for a long time now teaching. Simple, safe classes: solid fundamentals, purposeful repetition and a good atmosphere. Here it's only Jiu-Jitsu, done well.

signup.title: Book your first class
signup.intro: Leave us your details and the Professor will get in touch. No commitment.

form.name: Full name
form.contactPlaceholder: So we can get back to you
form.sectionHelp: Choose "Kids" if you're signing up on behalf of a minor.
form.parentNamePlaceholder: Who is responsible for the child
form.messagePlaceholder: Any questions or anything we should know?

validation.name: Please tell us your name.
validation.contact: We need a phone or email to reply to you.

errors.generic: We couldn't send that. Please try again in a moment.
errors.notConfigured: The form isn't connected to the database yet. Configure Supabase to enable it.

success.title: Got it — thank you!
success.body: We've saved your request. The Professor will write to you soon to say hello.

seminars.title: Seminars & events
seminars.intro: Special classes, guest masterclasses and open mats. Sign up to reserve your spot and let the Professor know you're coming.
seminars.empty: No upcoming seminars right now. Check back soon.

form.contactPlaceholder: So we can confirm with you

validation.contact: We need a phone or email to confirm with you.

success.title: Spot reserved!
success.body: You're on the list for this seminar. The Professor is counting on you. If anything changes, we'll reach you at the contact you left.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.intro: Questions before signing up? Message us or drop by the academy.
contact.note: To join, use the form — it's the fastest way.
